taxonomy: Psilocaulon dimorphum is classified as a succulent plant species within the family Aizoaceae. The genus Psilocaulon belongs to the subfamily Ruschioideae. This classification places Psilocaulon dimorphum among the flowering plants, specifically within the angiosperm group. The family Aizoaceae, also known as the stone plants, consists of various succulent species native to southern Africa. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Psilocaulon dimorphum and its related species.
